items.briefing:
The Australian Communications and Media Authority (ACMA) has announced its 2026–27 compliance priorities, with a focus on protecting consumers from scams and harmful content — a reminder that regulatory scrutiny on organisations handling consumer data remains high. Separately, a global report highlights that education providers are increasingly exposed to cyber incidents through their third-party vendors and software suppliers, not just direct attacks.

If your organisation uses external software platforms or service providers, ensure someone is responsible for reviewing their security practices regularly. **Practical tip:** Ask your key vendors whether they have had any recent security incidents and how they notify customers if something goes wrong.

featured.title: Third-Party Breaches Teach Education Sector a Costly Lesson in Vendor Risk
featured.quote: Third-party vendor breaches pose escalating risks to Australian educational institutions and student data.
